name: Metronome
descs: In odd-numbered turns, all allies gain 1 [AttackDmgUp]. In even-numbered turns, all allies gain 1 [Protection].
In odd-numbered turns, all allies gain 1 [AttackDmgUp]. In even-numbered turns, all allies gain 1 [Protection] and 1 [DefenseUp].
In odd-numbered turns, all allies gain 1 [AttackDmgUp] and 1 [AttackUp]. In even-numbered turns, all allies gain 1 [Protection] and 1 [DefenseUp].
